studyName: Breast Cancer Genome Guided Therapy Study (BEAUTY)

tables.description: This sample attributes table contains de-identified sample ID, body site where sample was collected, analyte type, tumor status, histologic type, primary metastatic tumor, primary tumor location, tumor stage, grade, treatment, name of the center which conducted sequencing, portion of sequencing lane, and comments.

variables.name: ANALYTE_TYPE
variables.description: Analyte Type

variables.name: BODY_SITE
variables.description: Body site where sample was collected

variables.name: COMMENTS
variables.description: Description of sequencing preparation or alignment exceptions

variables.name: HISTOLOGIC_TYPE
variables.description: Cell or tissue type or subtype of sample

variables.name: IS_TUMOR
variables.description: Tumor status

variables.name: LANE_PORTION
variables.description: Portion of sequencing lane taken by the sample

variables.name: PRIMARY_METASTATIC_TUMOR
variables.description: Primary tumor, metastasis, or transformed cell line

variables.name: PRIMARY_TUMOR_LOCATION
variables.description: Primary tumor location

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: De-identified Sample ID

variables.name: SEQUENCING_CENTER
variables.description: Name of the center which conducted sequencing

variables.name: TUMOR_GRADE
variables.description: Tumor grade of sample

variables.name: TUMOR_STAGE
variables.description: Tumor stage of sample

variables.name: TUMOR_TREATMENT
variables.description: Type of tumor treatment for sample

tables.description: This subject phenotype table contains subject ID, pathological complete response in breast and nodes, clinical molecular tumor type, tumor stage, nodal stage, lab estimate of tumor percentage at baseline, Ki67 sensitivity, estrogen and progesterone receptor level, HER2 results by IHC or Fish, and patient age.

variables.name: Age.group
variables.description: Patient age at date on study, marked in 10 year group

variables.name: Breast.Nodal.CR.all
variables.description: Pathological complete response in breast and nodes (path-CR) after 24 weeks of chemo-therapy or the patient's regimen.

variables.name: Clinical.Molecular.Subtype
variables.description: Clinical molecular tumor type, based on baseline Ki67 results, estrogen receptor level and HER2 status (by IHC or FISH)

variables.name: Estrogen.receptor
variables.description: Estrogen Receptor level

variables.name: HER2.FISH
variables.description: HER2 results by Fish

variables.name: HER2.IHC
variables.description: HER2 results by IHC

variables.name: Ki67Sensitivity
variables.description: Was tumor sensitive to chemo decreasing significantly by Ki67 measure?

variables.name: N.stage
variables.description: Nodal stage, based on if tumor spread to lymph nodes by breast and, if so, how many nodes are affected

variables.name: Percentage.tumor.cells.baseline
variables.description: Lab estimate of tumor percentage at baseline

variables.name: Progesterone.receptor
variables.description: Progesterone Receptor level

variables.name: Subject_ID
variables.description: Subject ID

variables.name: T.stage
variables.description: Tumor stage, based on size and spread to skin or chest wall under breast

tables.description: This data table contains a mapping of study subject IDs to sample IDs. Samples are the final preps submitted for genotyping, sequencing, and/or expression data. For example, if one patient (subject ID) gave one sample, and that sample was processed differently to generate 2 sequencing runs, there would be two rows, both using the same subject ID, but having 2 unique sample IDs. The data table also includes sample aliases and sample use.

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Sample ID

variables.name: SAMPLE_SOURCE
variables.description: Source repository where samples originate

variables.name: SAMPLE_USE
variables.description: Sample Use

variables.name: SOURCE_SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Sample ID used in the Source Repository

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID

tables.description: The subject consent file includes subject IDs, consent information, and case control status of the subject. All subjects are patients with Stage I-III breast cancer.

variables.name: AFFECTION_STATUS
variables.description: Case control status of the subject. All subjects are patients with Stage I-III breast cancer.

variables.name: CONSENT
variables.description: Consent group as determined by DAC

variables.name: Subject_ID
variables.description: Subject ID
